title: Curriculum Specialist (Continuing Status)
unit: Department of Computational Mathematics, Science and Engineering
notes: Led curriculum development for a new department; designed and implemented new undergraduate and graduate CMSE courses.

title: Director of User Support
notes: Supervised research consultants; restarted and managed the ICER intern program; coordinated campus-wide research computing user support strategy.

title: Director
notes: Managed HPC staff and student interns; oversaw ~1M annual budget; maintained large-scale research computing infrastructure; supported over 1,000 active users.

title: Research Specialist
notes: Developed and managed student intern program; provided advanced research computing consulting; participated as NSF XSEDE Campus Champion support staff.

title: Assistant Research Professor
unit: CUbiC Center for Cognitive Ubiquitous Computing
notes: Conducted research in assistive and rehabilitative technologies; coordinated funding proposals; mentored graduate and undergraduate researchers.

title: Visiting Assistant Professor
notes: Developed medical image feature fusion techniques and explored machine vision applications for biological research.

title: Adjunct Faculty
notes: Served as Ph.D. committee member; supported GPU porting of electromagnetic simulation code.

title: Adjunct Faculty
notes: Worked with the Pattern Recognition and Image Processing Lab on 3D face recognition algorithms.

title: NSF IGERT Research Associate
notes: Participated in interdisciplinary cognitive science research focused on human navigation.

title: Graduate Research Assistant
notes: Worked on the Nursebot project; developed Bayesian models for plan recognition and execution monitoring.

title: Graduate Research Fellow
notes: Developed simulators and distributed vision algorithms for robotic manipulators.

title: Professional Research Consultant
notes: Consulted on NSF and MTRAC-funded projects related to image processing systems, cloud-based analytics, and software frameworks.
